examples: She busies herself with her butterfly collection
he occupies two rooms on the top floor
I worry about the second Germanic consonant shift

meanings.definition: march aggressively into another's territory by military force for the purposes of conquest and occupation

examples: It took three hours to get to work this morning
This event occupied a very short time

meanings.definition: consume all of one's attention or time
examples: Her interest in butterflies absorbs her completely

meanings.definition: assume, as of positions or roles
examples: She took the job as director of development
he occupies the position of manager
the young prince will soon occupy the throne

meanings.definition: held or filled or in use
examples: she keeps her time well occupied

meanings.definition: seized and controlled as by military invasion

examples: not all the occupied (or tenanted) apartments were well kept up

meanings.definition: having ones attention or mind or energy engaged
examples: she keeps herself fully occupied with volunteer activities
